item.title: Carmine Char

item.title: Elisabeth de Dragoness

item.title: Vimak Vaimei-Laga
item.description: Note Vimak Vaimei-Laga § Base Info § TypePlayer CharacterPlayerRoy Character Information § NameVimak Vaimei-LagaAliases- “Lonehunter” (Clan name)- Ysmir Hardrada (borrowed name)GenderMaleCreature TypeHumanoidRaceGoliathClassPaladin (Oath of Devotion)BornDevostina Alps, 30 years agoLanguagesCommon, Giant, ElvishFamily- Kuori “Bearkiller” (father)- Lo-Kag “Wordpainter” (mother)- Aukan “Keepeye” (brother, deceased)Connections- Party (member)- The Bonehead (Captain)- Gathakeaku Clan (ex-member, banished)- Hevenar (Oath patron)StatusAliveSessionsAll Sessions Stats § Level7HP63AC18Str13Int15Dex11Wis11Con14Cha12 Vimak Vaimei-Laga is a Goliath Oath of Devotion Paladin.

item.title: Greyskil Refugee Resistance
item.description: Also known as the GRR, based in Geros region of Greyskil.
